They printed actual_monthly_payment as Fraction(3,2)*10000 = Fraction(15000,1) which prints 15000? Actually Fraction prints as Fraction(15000,1). But they printed f"${actual_monthly_payment}" which would show "15000"? Actually Fraction(15000,1) prints "15000". So fine.

3.1 Premature Termination: No.

3.3 No or Incorrect Verification: No.

Thus all no. The task is completed. Summary: no issues.
